nodes.name: Retell Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Retell posts call data here when a call ends. Set this webhook URL inside Retell > Agent > Post Call Webhook.

nodes.name: Respond 200 OK
nodes.notes: Immediately acknowledge receipt to Retell so it does not retry.

nodes.name: Parse + Validate Payload
nodes.notes: Maps all Retell fields to standard names. Sets isQualified flag used for branching.

nodes.name: Is Payload Valid?
nodes.notes: If phone or name is missing, route to error log. Otherwise continue.

nodes.name: Log Invalid Payload
nodes.notes: Catches calls where phone or name was not captured. Review these manually.

nodes.name: Is Caller Qualified?
nodes.notes: Qualified leads go to full GHL pipeline entry. Disqualified still create a contact but skip pipeline.

nodes.name: GHL – Create Contact (Qualified)
nodes.notes: Creates or updates GHL contact for qualified leads. Replace GHL API key before going live.

nodes.name: GHL – Create Contact (Disqualified)
nodes.notes: Still creates a GHL contact for disqualified leads for audit purposes. Tagged Disqualified.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "name": "{{ $('GHL – Create Contact (Qualified)').item.json.contact.firstName }} {{ $('GHL – Create Contact (Qualified)').item.json.contact.lastName }} – {{ $('GHL – Create Contact (Qualified)').item.json.contact.customFields[3].fieldValue[0] }}",
  "contactId": "{{ $('GHL – Create Contact (Qualified)').item.json.contact.id }}",
  "pipelineId": "YOUR_GHL_PIPELINE_ID",
  "locationId": "YOUR_GHL_LOCATION_ID",
  "status": "open",
  "source": "Ava Inbound Call"
}

nodes.name: GHL – Add to Pipeline (New Lead)
nodes.notes: Adds qualified contact to GHL pipeline at New Lead stage. Replace PIPELINE_ID and STAGE_ID after Debbie's walkthrough.

nodes.name: GHL – Attach Recording Note (Qualified)
nodes.notes: Posts a note to the GHL contact with full call summary and Twilio recording URL. Closes the compliance loop.

nodes.name: GHL – Attach Recording Note (Disqualified)
nodes.notes: Attaches recording to disqualified contact too — required for full compliance audit trail.
